title: Featurosity
description: A mod devoted to enhancing useless/pointless Minecraft features.
body:
# Featurosity A Minecraft mod for enhancing pointless features ### Current Enhancements: - Abilty to throw Fire Charges - Polished Tuff along with: Tuff walls, stairs, and slabs - Crop Blocks with a Spore Blossom in a 3x3x4 range above them will grow at 2x speed - Copper Hopper Block & Minecart which transfer items 2x as fast as regular hoppers ##### (Not much now but I have plans to add 1 new feature a week) ### Languages Is your language not a part of featurosity? Translate it [on CrowdIn](https://crowdin.com/project/featurosity)! Your translations will be included in the next release. ### Supported Loaders Fabric + Forge.\ \ \

## Server Hosting! Kinetic Hosting is a minecraft serving hosting website with competitive prices. Get 10% off your first month when you use code "declip".
